name: MaskInput
description: A text input that formats user input against a declared token mask.

slots.label: Optional text label.
slots.description: Optional helper text describing the expected pattern.

mask.description: Mask string where 9 means digit, a means letter, and * means alphanumeric.

placeholderChar.description: Placeholder used for empty editable positions.

aria.aria-describedby: Connect to format description and errors.
